name: AIDLC Board Sync
description: When Code Generation is marked complete in aidlc-state.md, updates the GitHub issue to Done and closes it.

then.prompt: The aidlc-state.md file was just updated. Read it and check if 'Code Generation' was just marked as complete ([x]). If yes: 1) Read .kiro/steering/project-config.md and check if 'project-management' power is registered. 2) If yes, activate that power. 3) Find the matching GitHub issue (search for 'aidlc:story' label matching the completed unit). 4) Move the issue to 'Done' on the project board. 5) Add a completion comment. 6) Close the issue. If Code Generation was NOT just completed, do nothing.
